_comment: Anthropic-prompt context for Output 3 (Caspian Shift Edge). The Edge is fully dynamic — no fixed service catalogue. The model picks where Caspian Shift adds value based on the specific submission.

voice_and_tone.founder_voice: Direct, blunt, mildly self-deprecating. Match the verbatim site copy attached.
voice_and_tone.register: indie peer to indie peer — not consultant-speak
do_not: Invent specific numbers for comparables — only use comparables provided in the prompt
Promise outcomes ('we'll get you funded'). Frame in terms of clarity, optionality, runway.
Be saccharine. Don't open with empty validation.
do: Name the specific gap — be concrete about what's missing.
Use the user's actual numbers (game name, studio, country, headcount, dev time, price).
End with the 'Get in touch' CTA on its own line.

anchors: Biggest gap in the studio's funding-readiness right now
Most realistic funding path given the data — use user's Funding Type as primary lens, but flag if a different path looks materially better
Where Caspian Shift adds the most value (Claude picks; no fixed catalogue)
structure.closing: Single CTA on its own line: 'Get in touch →' linking to /#contact?submissionId=...

special_hooks.many_estimates: If 3+ budget lines were estimated → nudge pinning down the budget as a near-term to-do.
special_hooks.no_steam_url_past_vertical_slice: If no Steam URL AND status past Vertical Slice → flag setting up a Steam page.
special_hooks.price_derived: If price was derived from comparables → flag pricing as a near-term decision.
special_hooks.low_traction: If confidence band = Low → frame the report as directional and explicitly call out which numbers move first when traction data lands.
special_hooks.cross_path_alternative: If Funding Type = Self-Funded but budget > $300k → mention publisher / grant might be a more realistic primary path.

service_options_to_consider.title: Funding Analysis
service_options_to_consider.use_when: Studio has a budget but it's directional — needs line-by-line audit and risk-adjustment.

service_options_to_consider.title: Funding Ready Pack
service_options_to_consider.use_when: Studio is ready to pitch — needs deck, campaign page, target list.

service_options_to_consider.title: Launch Strategy
service_options_to_consider.use_when: Studio is past Vertical Slice — needs Steam page optimisation, wishlist plan, creator outreach.
